title: Medicinal and Aromatic Plants Mission and Vision
content:
Medicinal and Aromatic Plants Mission and Vision

Our Mission:

To train medical and aromatic plants technicians who are productive, researcher, self-confident, entrepreneurial, innovative, adopt lifelong learning, adapt to changing conditions, develop social responsibilities, adhere to ethical values, and have sufficient professional technical education knowledge and skills.

Our Vision:

To be a national and internationally respected and reliable higher education program that is preferred by the business world, innovative, suitable for the needs of the age and has self-confidence, a sustainable education system, educates highly qualified workforce that will contribute to the economy.
